title: Project Engineer (Agriculture) #81042
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Agribusiness & Global Commodity-Trading
  • Position Title: Project Engineer (Agriculture)
  • Working Location: Central
  • Working Hours: 5.5 days / Mon to Alternate Sat: 9am-6pm
  • Salary Package: Up to SGD 8500 + AWS
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate engineering deliverables across multiple agricultural projects, ensuring adherence to established timelines, budgets, and quality expectations
  • Serve as a key liaison among field engineers, agronomists, contractors, suppliers, and stakeholders to enable efficient project execution
  • Support the planning, scheduling, and oversight of maintenance, installation, and operational activities related to agricultural equipment and infrastructure
  • Prepare technical reports, project documentation, and presentations for management and stakeholder review
  • Ensure project sites comply with all safety, environmental, and quality regulations.
  • Assist with procurement activities and manage inventory of engineering tools, machinery, and spare parts
  • Provide on-site technical assistance and troubleshoot operational issues as they arise.
  • Arrange travel plans and coordinate logistical support for engineering teams visiting project locations
  • Analyze project performance data and recommend improvements to enhance efficiency and outcomes
  • Conduct risk assessments and implement mitigation measures to support safe and effective engineering operations
  • Contribute to budgeting efforts, monitor project costs, and support resource allocation processes
  • Maintain detailed records of project milestones, equipment servicing, and technical documentation
  • Deliver training and offer technical guidance to field personnel and junior engineers
  • Collaborate with R&D teams to adopt and implement innovative agricultural technologies.
  • Promote clear, consistent communication between the head office, field teams, and external partners
  • Support sustainability goals by contributing to environmentally responsible engineering practices

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Degree in Agricultural Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, or a related technical field
  • Min. 2 years of experience in agricultural engineering, field operations, or project coordination roles
  • Proficient in project management tools and Microsoft Office Suite
  • Knowledge of modern agricultural equipment and technologies is a plus
  • Commitment to sustainability and environmentally responsible engineering practices
  • Able to undertake overseas travel to project locations as required

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #81042 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
